chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1606 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case. 16-10-2025 Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. **** Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate files Vakalatnama as well as statement on behalf of respondent No.5, taken on record. Learned AAG also files statement on behalf of respondent No.7, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioner. Perusal of the statement filed by respondent No.5 reveals that Civil Suit No.20 of 2022 was filed by the son of the petitioner, which was dismissed vide order dated 09.03.2022, and for the same relief, the petitioner has now approached this Court. Under the circumstances, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
